name: Hexa Color Stack Game
description: Hexa Color Stack ek super fun aur relaxing puzzle game hai jisme aapko colorful hexagon blocks ko stack aur match karna hota hai. Is game ka gameplay simple hai lekin bohot addictive hai, jahan aapko smart moves aur quick thinking ki zaroorat hoti hai. Har level me aapko different colors ko perfectly arrange karna hota hai. Jitna zyada aap correct stacking karenge utna high score milega. Ye game brain training ke liye best hai aur casual players ke liye perfect time pass game hai. Agar aapko color sorting games, stack puzzle challenges, aur relaxing brain games pasand hain to Hexa Color Stack aapke liye best choice hai.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
